channel.title: Data Analysis on Mahwish Profile
channel.description: Recent content in Data Analysis on Mahwish Profile

item.title: Building My First Power BI Dashboard
item.description:
Creating my first Power BI dashboard was an exciting milestone in my data analytics journey. It helped me turn raw data into meaningful insights and taught me how powerful visualization can be in storytelling.

Paragraph
